WF001.overview: Premium 2-bedroom apartment in prestigious Jefferson Lane precinct. Features modern appointments, stunning views, and excellent lifestyle amenities in the heart of Palm Beach.
WF001.marketAnalysis: Our analysis of recent sales in the Jefferson Lane precinct shows strong demand for quality 2-bedroom apartments. Based on comparable properties, we recommend a strategic pricing approach of $2,000,000 to maximize interest and achieve the best possible outcome. Recent sales range from $1,750,000 to $1,920,000 for similar properties.
WF001.buyerFeedback: Based on 35 inspections and enquiries, we have compiled comprehensive feedback. 65% provided positive feedback on location, presentation, and lifestyle offering. 23% raised price concerns, indicating room for negotiation. Strong market response positions us well for a successful campaign.
WF001.marketingStrategy: Recommended 4-6 week campaign targeting both owner-occupiers and premium investors. Comprehensive digital marketing across Domain, realestate.com.au, and social media channels. Professional photography and virtual tours to maximize online engagement. Strategic pricing at $2,000,000 allows negotiation flexibility while maximizing market interest.
nextSteps: Weekly progress reports and feedback analysis
